description: Purchase orders exceeding defined value thresholds require multi-level executive approval before processing.
trigger_condition: PO amount exceeds employee approval limit or INR 50,00,000
recommended_action: Route PO to next approval level and notify Finance Controller

description: Ensures approvers cannot authorize purchase orders or invoices exceeding their sanctioned approval limit.
trigger_condition: Approval action attempted where amount > approver max_approval_limit_inr
recommended_action: Block approval and escalate to higher authority

description: Prevents any purchase order, invoice, or payment activity involving vendors marked as blacklisted.
trigger_condition: vendor_status = Blacklisted on referenced PO, invoice, or transaction
recommended_action: Block transaction and notify Compliance and Procurement teams

description: Identifies invoices submitted more than once for the same vendor, PO, and amount.
trigger_condition: Two or more invoices share vendor_id, purchase_order_id and total_amount_inr within 30 days
recommended_action: Hold invoice for manual review and notify AP team

description: Flags invoices where the invoiced amount deviates materially from the associated purchase order amount.
trigger_condition: abs(invoice_amount_inr - po_amount_inr) / po_amount_inr > 10%
recommended_action: Route invoice to procurement for reconciliation

description: Validates that purchase order, goods/invoice receipt, and vendor invoice details are consistent before payment.
trigger_condition: match_status != Matched at time of payment initiation
recommended_action: Suspend payment until three-way match is completed

description: Monitors vendors whose risk_category is High and flags continued transaction activity.
trigger_condition: vendor risk_category = High and transaction_count > 5 in quarter
recommended_action: Trigger enhanced due diligence review

description: Detects payments made in unusually round amounts, a common indicator of manual manipulation or fraud.
trigger_condition: transaction_amount_inr is a multiple of 50,000 with no fractional value
recommended_action: Flag transaction for manual fraud review

description: Monitors payment transactions initiated on Saturdays or Sundays outside standard processing cycles.
trigger_condition: transaction_date falls on Saturday or Sunday
recommended_action: Log event and include in weekly exception report

description: Detects system activity and financial transactions occurring outside standard business hours.
trigger_condition: created_at timestamp between 21:00 and 06:00 local time
recommended_action: Flag session and notify IT Security for verification

description: Reviews payments made in a currency different from the invoice's designated currency.
trigger_condition: transaction currency != invoice currency for same invoice_id
recommended_action: Escalate to Treasury for FX exposure and compliance review

description: Detects multiple completed payments issued against the same invoice for the full invoice amount.
trigger_condition: More than one Completed transaction with amount = invoice total for same invoice_id
recommended_action: Reverse duplicate payment and notify Finance Controller

description: Tracks payments made significantly after the invoice due date.
trigger_condition: transaction_date - due_date > 45 days
recommended_action: Notify AP manager and review vendor payment terms

description: Detects payments processed against invoices that were rejected, disputed, or cancelled.
trigger_condition: transaction exists for invoice_status in (Rejected, Disputed, Cancelled)
recommended_action: Immediately freeze payment and escalate to Compliance and Legal

description: Identifies vendors receiving an unusually high number of payments within a short time window.
trigger_condition: More than 3 transactions to same vendor_id within 48 hours
recommended_action: Flag vendor account for fraud investigation

description: Detects multiple transactions processed in rapid succession by the same approver.
trigger_condition: 3 or more transactions approved by same employee within 10 minutes
recommended_action: Review approver activity log for irregularities

description: Requires review whenever a vendor's bank account or IFSC details are modified.
trigger_condition: Vendor Updated audit event with change to bank_account_number or ifsc_code
recommended_action: Require secondary verification before next payment release

description: Flags transactions or purchase orders raised against vendors marked Inactive or Suspended.
trigger_condition: vendor_status in (Inactive, Suspended) with associated PO, invoice or transaction
recommended_action: Block transaction and require vendor reactivation approval

description: Monitors unexpected changes to employee approval levels or system roles.
trigger_condition: Role Changed event increases approval_level beyond normal progression
recommended_action: Notify HR and Internal Audit for validation

description: Ensures the same employee cannot request, approve, and pay for the same purchase order or invoice.
trigger_condition: requested_by, approved_by, or verified_by employee_id overlaps across PO/invoice/transaction chain
recommended_action: Block action and reassign to independent approver

description: Detects payments processed through manual override outside standard approval workflow.
trigger_condition: Payment Initiated audit event with status Warning and override flag present
recommended_action: Escalate to Finance Controller for justification review

description: Monitors repeated failed login attempts that may indicate credential compromise.
trigger_condition: 3 or more Failed status User Login events for same employee_id within 1 hour
recommended_action: Lock account temporarily and notify IT Security

description: Ensures all audit log entries marked Critical severity are escalated for immediate review.
trigger_condition: audit_logs severity = Critical
recommended_action: Auto-escalate to Compliance Officer within 1 hour

description: Alerts Finance leadership to unusually large aggregate outbound payment volumes in a given period.
trigger_condition: Sum of daily transaction_amount_inr exceeds INR 5,00,00,000
recommended_action: Notify CFO and generate cash flow exception report

description: Ensures periodic compliance and audit reports are generated and distributed on schedule.
trigger_condition: Scheduled reporting date reached without corresponding Report Generated audit event
recommended_action: Trigger automated report generation and notify Compliance team
